Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(******************************************************************************************

 Coreflections in a 2-category

 In this file, we construct the double category of coreflections in  a 2-category. Given a
 2-category `C`, we define the following double category:
 - Objects: objects in `C`
 - Vertical morphisms: coreflections in `C` (i.e., adjunctions in `C` whose unit is given
   by an identity)
 - Horizontal morphisms: morphisms in `C`
 - Squares with vertical sides `f : x₁ --> x₂` and `g : y₁ --> y₂` and horizontal sides
   `h : x₁ --> y₁` and `k : x₂ --> y₂` are 2-cells `h · g ==> f · k`

 Note that we only define this double category for locally univalent 2-categories. This is
 to guarantee that being a left adjoint is a property, which we use to prove the laws for
 the vertical morphisms. Such 2-categories are given by categories enriched over posets.

 We also show that this double category is an equipment (i.e., it has all companion pairs
 and all conjoints. To do so, we provide several lemmas useful for calculations.

 Contents
 1. Coreflections in a 2-category
 2. The displayed category of adjunctions
 3. The displayed category of coreflections
 4. The double category of coreflections
 5. Lemmas for calculation
 6. Companions and conjoints

 ******************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.TwoCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Examples.Sigma.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Strictness.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.SquaresTwoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Strictness.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.Composition.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.StrictDoubleCatBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.UnivalentDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.PseudoDoubleSetCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.CompanionsAndConjoints.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Examples.SquareDoubleCatTwo.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Examples.DoubleCatOnDispCat.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_cat.

Import TwoCategories.Notations.

(** * 1. Coreflections in a 2-category *)
Definition is_coreflection
           {C : two_cat}
           {x y : C}
           (f : x --> y)
           (Hf : left_adjoint (B := two_cat_to_bicat C) f)
  : UU
  := ∑ p, left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor p.


C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
isaprop (is_coreflection f Hf)


C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
isaprop (is_coreflection f Hf)

  
C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : identity x =
          f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
   left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x0)
C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
∏
x0 y0 : identity x = f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
(λ x1 : identity x = f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
 left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x1) x0
→ (λ x1 : identity x =
          f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
   left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x1) y0 → x0 = y0

  
C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : identity x =
          f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
   left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x0)
 
C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
x0: identity x = f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf
isaprop (left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x0)

    apply cellset_property.
  
C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
∏
x0 y0 : identity x = f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
(λ x1 : identity x = f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
 left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x1) x0
→ (λ x1 : identity x =
          f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
   left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x1) y0 → x0 = y0
 
C: two_cat
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
x0, y0: identity x = f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf
X: (λ x0 : identity x =
        f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
 left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x0) x0
X0: (λ x0 : identity x =
        f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf,
 left_adjoint_unit Hf = idto2mor x0) y0
x0 = y0

    apply (homset_property C).
Qed.


C: two_cat
x: C
is_coreflection
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)


C: two_cat
x: C
is_coreflection
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)

  
C: two_cat
x: C
identity x =
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x
· left_adjoint_right_adjoint
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
C: two_cat
x: C
(λ p : identity x =
       internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x
       · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x),
 left_adjoint_unit
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) =
 idto2mor p) ?pr1

  
C: two_cat
x: C
identity x =
internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x
· left_adjoint_right_adjoint
    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
 exact (!(id_left (C := C) _)).
  
C: two_cat
x: C
(λ p : identity x =
       internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x
       · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x),
 left_adjoint_unit
   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) =
 idto2mor p) (! id_left (identity x))
 
C: two_cat
x: C
idto2mor (! id_left (identity x)) =
idto2mor (! id_left (identity x))

    apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
is_coreflection (f · g) (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg)


C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
is_coreflection (f · g) (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg)

  
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
identity x =
f · g
· left_adjoint_right_adjoint
    (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg)
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(λ p : identity x =
       f · g
       · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg),
 left_adjoint_unit (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg) =
 idto2mor p) ?pr1

  
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C

Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
identity x =
f · g
· left_adjoint_right_adjoint
    (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg)
 
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
identity x =
f · g
· (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
   · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧

identity x =
f
· (g
   · (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
f
· (g
   · (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = identity x

x, y, z: C

f
· (g
   · (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?b

C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
g · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg = ?y'

        exact (!(pr1 Hg')).
      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
identity y · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf = ?t2

      apply (id_left (C := C)).
    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf = identity x

    exact (!(pr1 Hf')).
  
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(λ p : identity x =
       f · g
       · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
           (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg),
 left_adjoint_unit (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg) =
 idto2mor p)
  (! (maponpaths (compose f)
        (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      ! pr1 Hf') @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)
   :
   identity x =
   f · g
   · left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       (comp_left_adjoint f g Hf Hg))
 
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(left_adjoint_unit Hf
 • (f
    ◃ ((idto2mor
          (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
        • (left_adjoint_unit Hg
           ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
       • idto2mor
           (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))))
• idto2mor
    (assoc f g
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
        · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) =
idto2mor
  (! (maponpaths (compose f)
        (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      ! pr1 Hf') @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(idto2mor (pr1 Hf')
 • (f
    ◃ ((idto2mor
          (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
        • (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
           ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
       • idto2mor
           (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))))
• idto2mor
    (assoc f g
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
        · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) =
idto2mor
  (! (maponpaths (compose f)
        (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      ! pr1 Hf') @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(idto2mor (pr1 Hf')
 • (f
    ◃ ((idto2mor
          (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
        • (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
           ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
       • idto2mor
           (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))))
• idto2mor
    (assoc f g
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
        · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?b
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
?b =
idto2mor
  (! (maponpaths (compose f)
        (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      ! pr1 Hf') @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(idto2mor (pr1 Hf')
 • (f
    ◃ ((idto2mor
          (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
        • (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
           ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
       • idto2mor
           (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))))
• idto2mor
    (assoc f g
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
        · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?b

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
idto2mor (pr1 Hf')
• (f
   ◃ ((idto2mor
         (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
       • (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
          ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
      • idto2mor

               (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))) =
?y'

(f

C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
f
◃ idto2mor
    (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?t20

        apply idto2mor_lwhisker.
      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(f
 ◃ (idto2mor
      (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
    • (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
       ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))
• idto2mor
    (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
       (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))) = ?t2

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
f
◃ (idto2mor
     (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))
   • (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
      ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?y'

      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg

 ◃ idto2mor
     (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))

   ◃ (idto2mor (pr1 Hg')
      ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?y'

       (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)

     • idto2mor
         (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
            (maponpaths
               (λ q : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,

        (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
           (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
                (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))))
• idto2mor
    (assoc f g
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
        · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) =
idto2mor
  (! (maponpaths (compose f)
        (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      ! pr1 Hf') @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))

idto2mor (pr1 Hf')
• idto2mor
    ((maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
        (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
        (maponpaths
           (λ q : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
            q · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)
           (pr1 Hg'))) @
     maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
       (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)

        apply idto2mor_comp.
      
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
idto2mor
  (pr1 Hf' @
   (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
      (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
    maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
      (maponpaths
         (λ q : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
          q · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) (pr1 Hg'))) @
   maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
     (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)))
• idto2mor
    (assoc f g
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
        · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) = ?b

      apply idto2mor_comp.
    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
idto2mor
  ((pr1 Hf' @
    (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
       (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
     maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
       (maponpaths
          (λ q : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
           q · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)
          (pr1 Hg'))) @
    maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
      (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))) @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) =
idto2mor
  (! (maponpaths (compose f)
        (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
         id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
      ! pr1 Hf') @
   assoc f g
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))

    
C: two_cat
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf: left_adjoint f
Hf': is_coreflection f Hf
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
Hg: left_adjoint g
Hg': is_coreflection g Hg
(pr1 Hf' @
 (maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
    (! id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
  maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
    (maponpaths
       (λ q : C ⟦ y, y ⟧,
        q · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) (pr1 Hg'))) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ y, x ⟧, f · q)
   (! assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf))) @
assoc f g
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
   · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) =
! (maponpaths (compose f)
     (assoc g (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg)
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
      maponpaths_2 compose (! pr1 Hg')
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) @
      id_left (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)) @
   ! pr1 Hf') @
assoc f g
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hg
   · left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf)

    apply (homset_property C).
Qed.

Section AdjunctionsAndCoreflections.
  Context (C : two_cat)
          (HC : locally_univalent_two_cat C).

  (** * 2. The displayed category of adjunctions *)
  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
disp_cat_ob_mor (two_cat_square_double_cat C)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
disp_cat_ob_mor (two_cat_square_double_cat C)

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
two_cat_square_double_cat C → UU
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
(λ obd : two_cat_square_double_cat C → UU,
 ∏ x y : two_cat_square_double_cat C,
 obd x
 → obd y → two_cat_square_double_cat C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
two_cat_square_double_cat C → UU
 exact (λ x, unit).
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
(λ obd : two_cat_square_double_cat C → UU,
 ∏ x y : two_cat_square_double_cat C,
 obd x
 → obd y → two_cat_square_double_cat C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ _ : two_cat_square_double_cat C, unit)

  Defined.

(yy : pr1 disp_cat_of_adj_data y)

(zz : disp_cat_of_adj_data z)

(gg : yy -->[ g] zz) (hh : zz -->[ h] ww),

  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
f: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data x
yy: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
f: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data x
yy: pr1 disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(id_disp xx ;; ff)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 apply isaprop_is_coreflection.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
f: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data x
yy: pr1 disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(ff ;; id_disp yy)%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
 apply isaprop_is_coreflection.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y, z, w: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
f: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ y, z ⟧
h: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ z, w ⟧
xx: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data x
yy: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data y
zz: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data z
ww: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data w
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
hh: zz -->[ h] ww
(ff ;; (gg ;; hh))%mor_disp =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 apply isaprop_is_coreflection.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
f: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data x
yy: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)
 
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
f: total_category disp_cat_of_adj ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data x
yy: disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection_data y
isaprop (xx -->[ f] yy)

      apply isaprop_is_coreflection.
  Qed.

z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) xx xx' → xx = xx'

xx = xx'

      apply isapropunit.

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C

xx, xx': disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection x
∏ x0 y : xx -->[ identity_z_iso x] xx',
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) x0
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) y → x0 = y

        apply isaprop_is_z_iso_disp.
      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
xx, xx': disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection x
∏ x0 y : xx -->[ identity_z_iso x] xx',
is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) x0
→ is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) y → x0 = y
 
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x: total_category disp_cat_of_adj
xx, xx': disp_cat_of_adj_is_coreflection x
x0, y: xx -->[ identity_z_iso x] xx'
X: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) x0
X0: is_z_iso_disp (identity_z_iso x) y
x0 = y

        apply isaprop_is_coreflection.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. The double category of coreflections *)

 exact disp_cat_of_coreflections.
  Defined.
End AdjunctionsAndCoreflections.

C: two_setcat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
∏ x : strict_two_cat_square_double_cat C,
isaset (disp_cat_of_coreflections C HC x)
 abstract
      (intros x ;
       use isaset_total2 ; intros ; apply isasetunit).
Defined.

(** * 5. Lemmas for calculation *)

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁ = v₁'
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂ = v₂'
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportf_square p q s =
((h₁ ◃ idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (! q))) • s)
• (idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 p) ▹ h₂)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁ = v₁'
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂ = v₂'
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportf_square p q s =
((h₁ ◃ idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (! q))) • s)
• (idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 p) ▹ h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportf_square (idpath v₁) (idpath v₂) s =
((h₁ ◃ idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (! idpath v₂))) • s)
• (idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (idpath v₁)) ▹ h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s =
((h₁ ◃ TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₂)) • s)
• (TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁) ▹ h₂)

  (* Note that we must qualify these identifies due the same names being used for bicategories *)
  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s =
((h₁ ◃ TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₂)) • s)
• TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁ · h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s =
(TwoCategories.id2 (h₁ · pr1 v₂) • s)
• TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁ · h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s = s • TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁ · h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s = s

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁' = v₁
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂' = v₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportb_square p q s =
((h₁ ◃ idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 q)) • s)
• (idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (! p)) ▹ h₂)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁' = v₁
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂' = v₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportb_square p q s =
((h₁ ◃ idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 q)) • s)
• (idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (! p)) ▹ h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
transportb_square (idpath v₁') (idpath v₂') s =
((h₁ ◃ idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (idpath v₂'))) • s)
• (idto2mor (maponpaths pr1 (! idpath v₁')) ▹ h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
s =
((h₁ ◃ TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₂')) • s)
• (TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁') ▹ h₂)

  (* Note that we must qualify these identifies due the same names being used for bicategories *)
  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
s =
((h₁ ◃ TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₂')) • s)
• TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁' · h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
s =
(TwoCategories.id2 (h₁ · pr1 v₂') • s)
• TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁' · h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
s = s • TwoCategories.id2 (pr1 v₁' · h₂)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
s = s

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
(identity_h x ·h h) · pr1 (identity_v y) =
pr1 (identity_v x) · h


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
(identity_h x ·h h) · pr1 (identity_v y) =
pr1 (identity_v x) · h

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
identity (pr1 x) · h · identity (pr1 y) =
identity (pr1 x) · h

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
identity (pr1 x) · h = identity (pr1 x) · h

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h h =
idto2mor (lunitor_h_coreflections_path h)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h h =
idto2mor (lunitor_h_coreflections_path h)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
(two_cat_runitor (identity (pr1 x) · h)
 • two_cat_lunitor h) • two_cat_linvunitor h =
idto2mor (lunitor_h_coreflections_path h)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
(idto2mor (id_right (identity (pr1 x) · h))
 • idto2mor (id_left h)) • idto2mor (! id_left h) =
idto2mor (lunitor_h_coreflections_path h)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
idto2mor
  ((id_right (identity (pr1 x) · h) @ id_left h) @
   ! id_left h) =
idto2mor (lunitor_h_coreflections_path h)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
(id_right (identity (pr1 x) · h) @ id_left h) @
! id_left h = lunitor_h_coreflections_path h

  apply (homset_property C).
Qed.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
h · pr1 (identity_v y) =
pr1 (identity_v x) · (identity_h x ·h h)

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
h · pr1 (identity_v y) =
pr1 (identity_v x) · (identity_h x ·h h)

x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
h · identity (pr1 y) =
identity (pr1 x) · (identity (pr1 x) · h)

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
h = identity (pr1 x) · (identity (pr1 x) · h)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
h: x -->h y
h = h

  apply idpath.
Qed.

h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y

pr1 (identity_v w) · ((h₁ ·h h₂) ·h h₃)

v: x -->v y

x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v: x -->v y

x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v: x -->v y

v: x -->v y

  apply idpath.

v: x -->v y

  apply (homset_property C).
Qed.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₁': y₁ -->v z₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
v₂': y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
h₃: z₁ -->h z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₁' v₂' h₂ h₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ =
(((idto2mor (assoc h₁ (pr1 v₂) (pr1 v₂'))
   • (s₁ ▹ pr1 v₂'))
  • idto2mor (! assoc (pr1 v₁) h₂ (pr1 v₂')))
 • (pr1 v₁ ◃ s₂))
• idto2mor (assoc (pr1 v₁) (pr1 v₁') h₃)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₁': y₁ -->v z₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
v₂': y₂ -->v z₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
h₃: z₁ -->h z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₂: square v₁' v₂' h₂ h₃
s₁ ⋆v s₂ =
(((idto2mor (assoc h₁ (pr1 v₂) (pr1 v₂'))
   • (s₁ ▹ pr1 v₂'))
  • idto2mor (! assoc (pr1 v₁) h₂ (pr1 v₂')))
 • (pr1 v₁ ◃ s₂))
• idto2mor (assoc (pr1 v₁) (pr1 v₁') h₃)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v x₂
v₂: y₁ -->v y₂
v₃: z₁ -->v z₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: y₁ -->h z₁
k₁: x₂ -->h y₂
k₂: y₂ -->h z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: square v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
s₁ ⋆h s₂ =
(((idto2mor (! assoc h₁ h₂ (pr1 v₃)) • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
  • idto2mor (assoc h₁ (pr1 v₂) k₂)) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
• idto2mor (! assoc (pr1 v₁) k₁ k₂)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: coreflections_double_cat C HC
v₁: x₁ -->v x₂
v₂: y₁ -->v y₂
v₃: z₁ -->v z₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: y₁ -->h z₁
k₁: x₂ -->h y₂
k₂: y₂ -->h z₂
s₁: square v₁ v₂ h₁ k₁
s₂: square v₂ v₃ h₂ k₂
s₁ ⋆h s₂ =
(((idto2mor (! assoc h₁ h₂ (pr1 v₃)) • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
  • idto2mor (assoc h₁ (pr1 v₂) k₂)) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
• idto2mor (! assoc (pr1 v₁) k₁ k₂)

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** * 6. Companions and conjoints *)

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
all_companions_double_cat
  (coreflections_double_cat C HC)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
all_companions_double_cat
  (coreflections_double_cat C HC)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
all_companions_double_cat
  (two_cat_square_double_cat C)

  apply all_companions_two_cat_square_double_cat.
Defined.

Section Conjoints.
  Context {C : two_cat}
          (HC : locally_univalent_two_cat C)
          {xx yy : coreflections_double_cat C HC}
          (fHf : xx -->v yy).

  Local Notation "'idto2mor'" := (idto2mor _) (only printing).

  Let x : C := pr1 xx.
  Let y : C := pr1 yy.
  Let f : x --> y := pr1 fHf.
  Let Hf : left_adjoint (B := two_cat_to_bicat C) f := pr12 fHf.

  Let r : yy -->h xx := left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf.
  Let η : _ ==> f · r := left_adjoint_unit Hf.
  Let ε : r · f ==> _ := left_adjoint_counit Hf.

  Let ηη : square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r := two_cat_runitor _ • η.
  Let εε : square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy) := ε • two_cat_rinvunitor _.

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) = idto2mor

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
identity x · f = f
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
identity x · f = f

      apply (id_left (C := C)).
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
f = f · identity y
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y

εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)

q₂: f = f · identity y
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) = idto2mor

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
f · identity y = f

      apply (id_right (C := C)).
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) =
(idto2mor
 • vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2
           (vcomp2 (linvunitor f)
              (rwhisker f (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf))))
           (rassociator f
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)) f))
        (lwhisker f (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf))))
     (runitor f)) • idto2mor
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor • id2 f) • idto2mor = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) =
(idto2mor
 • vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2
           (vcomp2 (linvunitor f)
              (rwhisker f (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf))))
           (rassociator f
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)) f))
        (lwhisker f (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf))))
     (runitor f)) • idto2mor
 
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε) =
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
      • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
      • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor =
((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε)

      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
      • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor = ?b
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
?b = ((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε)

      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
      • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor = ?b

        
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx

ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
idto2mor
• ((((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
     • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)))
   • idto2mor) = ?y'

        
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r

εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor
 • (((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
     • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf))))
• idto2mor = ?y'

        
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
idto2mor
• (((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
    • idto2mor) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf))) =
?y'

        
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor
 • ((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
    • idto2mor)) • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)) =
?y'

        
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
idto2mor
• ((idto2mor • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf) ▹ f))
   • idto2mor) = ?y'

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C

q₂: f = f · identity y

  • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf))) • idto2mor)
• idto2mor = ((η ▹ f) • idto2mor) • (f ◃ ε)

ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
idto2mor = idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
! assoc f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)) f = p

      apply (homset_property C).
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
(idto2mor • id2 f) • idto2mor = idto2mor

f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: f · r · f = f · (r · f)
q₁: identity x · f = f
q₂: f = f · identity y
q₁ @ q₂ = id_left f @ ! id_right f

      apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
((r ◃ η) • idto2mor) • (ε ▹ r) = idto2mor

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
((r ◃ η) • idto2mor) • (ε ▹ r) =
(idto2mor
 • vcomp2
     (vcomp2
        (vcomp2
           (vcomp2
              (rinvunitor
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)))
              (lwhisker
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf))
                 (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf))))
           (lassociator
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)) f
              (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf))))
        (rwhisker
           (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf))
           (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf))))
     (lunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf))))
• idto2mor

y:= pr1 yy: C

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
(idto2mor • id2 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)))
• idto2mor = idto2mor

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
((r ◃ η) • idto2mor) • (ε ▹ r) =
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)
          ◃ left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf))) • idto2mor)
     • (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)
        ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor

      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)
          ◃ left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf))) • idto2mor)
     • (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)
        ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor =
((r ◃ η) • idto2mor) • (ε ▹ r)

      
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
(idto2mor
 • ((((idto2mor
       • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)
          ◃ left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hf))) • idto2mor)
     • (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)
        ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf)))
    • idto2mor)) • idto2mor = ?b

η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
idto2mor
• ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf))
   • (idto2mor • idto2mor)) = ?b

y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
p: r · (f · r) = r · f · r
q₁: r · identity x = r
q₂: r = identity y · r
(left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hf)
 ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hf))
• (idto2mor • idto2mor) = ?t2

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square
  (id_v_left (identity_v yy · identity_v yy) @
   id_v_left (identity_v yy))
  (id_v_left (identity_v xx · identity_v xx) @
   id_v_left (identity_v xx))
  (rinvunitor_h r ⋆v (εε ⋆h ηη ⋆v lunitor_h r)) =
id_v_square r

  
C: two_cat

εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square
  (id_v_left (identity_v yy · identity_v yy) @
   id_v_left (identity_v yy))
  (id_v_left (identity_v xx · identity_v xx) @
   id_v_left (identity_v xx))
  (rinvunitor_h r ⋆v (εε ⋆h ηη ⋆v lunitor_h r)) =
id_v_square r

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
(idto2mor • idto2mor ⋆v (εε ⋆h ηη ⋆v idto2mor))
• idto2mor = id_v_square r

 • idto2mor
   ⋆v (((((idto2mor • (r ◃ ηη)) • idto2mor) • (εε ▹ r))

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
(((((idto2mor • (r ◃ ηη)) • idto2mor) • idto2mor)
  • idto2mor)
 • (pr1 (identity_v yy)
    ◃ ((εε ▹ r) ▹ pr1 (identity_v xx)))) • idto2mor =
id_v_square r

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor
• ((r ◃ ηη)
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • ((pr1 (identity_v yy)
                ◃ ((εε ▹ r) ▹ pr1 (identity_v xx)))
               • idto2mor))))) = id_v_square r

idto2mor
• ((r ◃ ηη)
   • (idto2mor
      • (idto2mor
         • (idto2mor
            • ((pr1 (identity_v yy)

               • idto2mor))))) = ?b

ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
(two_cat_lunitor
   (r · pr1 fHf · r · pr1 (identity_v xx))
 • ((εε ▹ r) ▹ pr1 (identity_v xx)))
• two_cat_linvunitor
    (pr1 (identity_v yy) · identity_h yy · r
     · pr1 (identity_v xx)) = ?t2

HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C

εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
two_cat_lunitor
  (r · pr1 fHf · r · pr1 (identity_v xx))
• ((εε ▹ r) ▹ pr1 (identity_v xx)) = ?y'

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r

      apply rwhisker_id1.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor
• ((r ◃ ηη)
   • ((idto2mor
       • ((two_cat_lunitor
             (r · pr1 fHf · r · pr1 (identity_v xx))
           • ((two_cat_runitor (r · pr1 fHf · r)
               • (εε ▹ r))
              • two_cat_rinvunitor
                  (pr1 (identity_v yy) · identity_h yy
                   · r)))
          • two_cat_linvunitor
              (pr1 (identity_v yy) · identity_h yy · r
               · pr1 (identity_v xx)))) • idto2mor)) =
id_v_square r

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor
• (((r ◃ two_cat_runitor (identity x)) • (r ◃ η))
   • (idto2mor
      • (((ε ▹ r)
          • (two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y) ▹ r))
         • idto2mor))) = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor
• (((r ◃ idto2mor) • (r ◃ η))
   • (idto2mor
      • (((ε ▹ r) • (idto2mor ▹ r)) • idto2mor))) =
idto2mor

      apply right_triangle.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor • (idto2mor • idto2mor) = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
((((((((maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 xx ⟧, r · q)
          (maponpaths pr1
             (! (id_v_left (... · ...) @
                 id_v_left (identity_v xx)))) @
        assoc r (pr1 (identity_v xx))
          (pr1 (identity_v xx ·v identity_v xx))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧,
          q · pr1 (identity_v xx ·v identity_v xx))
         (rinvunitor_h_coreflections_path r)) @
      ! assoc (pr1 (identity_v yy))
          (r ·h identity_h xx)
          (pr1 (identity_v xx ·v identity_v xx))) @
     maponpaths
       (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧,
        pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
       (assoc (r ·h identity_h xx)
          (pr1 (identity_v xx)) (pr1 (identity_v xx)))) @
    maponpaths
      (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧,
       pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
      (maponpaths
         (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧,
          q · pr1 (identity_v xx))
         (! assoc r (identity_h xx)
              (pr1 (identity_v xx))))) @
   id_left
     (r · (identity_h xx · pr1 (identity_v xx))
      · pr1 (identity_v xx))) @
  id_right (r · (identity_h xx · pr1 (identity_v xx)))) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 xx ⟧, r · q)
   (id_right (identity x))) @
(id_right r @ ! id_left r) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 yy ⟧, q · r)
  (! id_right (identity y)) @
! id_right (pr1 (identity_v yy) · identity_h yy · r) @
! id_left
    (pr1 (identity_v yy) · identity_h yy · r
     · pr1 (identity_v xx)) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧, pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
  (maponpaths
     (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧,
      q · pr1 (identity_v xx))
     (! assoc (pr1 (identity_v yy)) (identity_h yy) r)) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧, pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
  (! assoc (pr1 (identity_v yy)) (identity_h yy ·h r)
       (pr1 (identity_v xx))) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧, pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
  (maponpaths
     (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧,
      pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
     (lunitor_h_coreflections_path r)) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 xx ⟧, pr1 (identity_v yy) · q)
  (assoc (pr1 (identity_v yy)) (pr1 (identity_v yy)) r) @
assoc (pr1 (identity_v yy))
  (pr1 (identity_v yy ·v identity_v yy)) r @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 yy ⟧, q · r)
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_v_left (identity_v yy · identity_v yy) @
      id_v_left (identity_v yy))) =
id_v_square_coreflections_path r

    apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square (id_v_right fHf) (id_v_left fHf)
  (ηη ⋆v εε) = id_h_square fHf

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C

fHf: xx -->v yy

f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square (id_v_right fHf) (id_v_left fHf)
  (ηη ⋆v εε) = id_h_square fHf

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C

ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y

εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
((identity_h xx ◃ idto2mor) • ηη ⋆v εε)
• (idto2mor ▹ identity_h yy) = id_h_square fHf

id_h_square fHf

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor
• ((ηη ▹ pr1 fHf)
   • (idto2mor
      • ((pr1 fHf ◃ εε) • (idto2mor • idto2mor)))) =
id_h_square fHf

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
idto2mor = idto2mor

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
((maponpaths
    (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧, identity_h xx · q)
    (maponpaths pr1 (! id_v_left fHf)) @
  assoc (identity_h xx) (pr1 (identity_v xx))
    (pr1 fHf)) @
 maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 xx ⟧, q · pr1 fHf)
   (id_right (identity x))) @
(id_left f @ ! id_right f) @
maponpaths (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 yy, pr1 yy ⟧, pr1 fHf · q)
  (! id_right (identity y)) @
assoc (pr1 fHf) (pr1 (identity_v yy)) (identity_h yy) @
maponpaths
  (λ q : C ⟦ pr1 xx, pr1 yy ⟧, q · identity_h yy)
  (maponpaths pr1 (id_v_right fHf)) =
id_h_square_coreflections_path fHf

    apply (homset_property C).
  Qed.

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
double_cat_are_conjoints r fHf

C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square
  (id_v_left (identity_v yy · identity_v yy) @
   id_v_left (identity_v yy))
  (id_v_left (identity_v xx · identity_v xx) @
   id_v_left (identity_v xx))
  (rinvunitor_h r ⋆v (?ε ⋆h ?η ⋆v lunitor_h r)) =
id_v_square r
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square (id_v_right fHf) (id_v_left fHf)
  (?η ⋆v ?ε) = id_h_square fHf

    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
 exact ηη.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
 exact εε.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square
  (id_v_left (identity_v yy · identity_v yy) @
   id_v_left (identity_v yy))
  (id_v_left (identity_v xx · identity_v xx) @
   id_v_left (identity_v xx))
  (rinvunitor_h r ⋆v (εε ⋆h ηη ⋆v lunitor_h r)) =
id_v_square r
 exact are_conjoints_coreflections_double_cat_left.
    
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
xx, yy: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: xx -->v yy
x:= pr1 xx: C
y:= pr1 yy: C
f:= pr1 fHf: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf: left_adjoint f
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf: yy -->h xx
η:= left_adjoint_unit Hf: identity x ==> f · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit Hf: r · f ==> identity y
ηη:= two_cat_runitor (identity x) • η: square fHf (identity_v xx) (identity_h xx) r
εε:= ε • two_cat_rinvunitor (identity y): square (identity_v yy) fHf r (identity_h yy)
transportf_square (id_v_right fHf) (id_v_left fHf)
  (ηη ⋆v εε) = id_h_square fHf
 exact are_conjoints_coreflections_double_cat_right.
  Defined.
End Conjoints.


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
all_conjoints_double_cat
  (coreflections_double_cat C HC)


C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
all_conjoints_double_cat
  (coreflections_double_cat C HC)

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x, y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: x -->v y
∑ h : y -->h x, double_cat_are_conjoints h fHf

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x: ∑ (_ : pr11 C) (_ : unit), unit
y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: x -->v y
∑ h : y -->h x, double_cat_are_conjoints h fHf

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x: ∑ (_ : pr11 C) (_ : unit), unit
y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: x -->v y
f:= pr1 fHf: two_cat_square_double_cat C ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧
∑ h : y -->h x, double_cat_are_conjoints h fHf

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x: ∑ (_ : pr11 C) (_ : unit), unit
y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: x -->v y
f:= pr1 fHf: two_cat_square_double_cat C ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf : left_adjoint (pr1 fHf): left_adjoint (pr1 fHf)
∑ h : y -->h x, double_cat_are_conjoints h fHf

  
C: two_cat
HC: locally_univalent_two_cat C
x: ∑ (_ : pr11 C) (_ : unit), unit
y: coreflections_double_cat C HC
fHf: x -->v y
f:= pr1 fHf: two_cat_square_double_cat C ⟦ pr1 x, pr1 y ⟧
Hf:= pr12 fHf : left_adjoint (pr1 fHf): left_adjoint (pr1 fHf)
double_cat_are_conjoints
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint Hf) fHf

  exact (are_conjoints_coreflections_double_cat HC fHf).
Defined.
